name: Tri-Color Box
description: A box that holds 9 marbles across 3 different colors (3 of each). All 3 colors are visible on the box before tapping.
howToPlay: Tap a tri-color box to release all 9 marbles (3 of each color). The three colored bands on the box show which colors are inside. Plan ahead — one tap feeds three sort columns at once!
author: Claude
